title: Fix (make vendor)
body:
`(export a=b command args)` does not run `(command args)` with `a=b`, it sets `$a` to `b`, and marks variables `$a` `$command` `$args` as exported, i.e. `(command args)` is not run.

So, before https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/888 we were not actually running `(go mod tidy)`, and now we are not running `(go mod vendor)`.

Just use `$(GO)`, which already sets `GO111MODULE=on`, without the extra export.

comments.body: Almost all `containers/*` repositories need the same fix. Fun…

> Almost all `containers/*` repositories need the same fix. Fun…

May the dependency lord have mercy on our souls...

LGTM
@mtrmac, would you open PRs against libpod, buildah and storage for that as well?
Luckily, in the others it’s still `go mod tidy` that is ineffective, so this does not hurt as much as if it did if it were `go mod vendor`.

> @mtrmac, would you open PRs against libpod, buildah and storage for that as well?

Will do.
